posts.author: Bingfa (Niall Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am unable to connect basic AD information to fields in Monday. Fields in Monday are severely limited for SCIM claims rules.

What are you trying to achieve

I need data to be automatically imported to allow me to, for example, manage cost reallocation to different parts of my business.
